Description
libbson has historically enforced a maximum nesting level of 100 via
STACK_MAX
in
bson-json.c
, which dates back to
mongodb/libbson@5a6e835
(if not earlier). This is consistent with the
server limit
.
PHPC enforces no such limit on its own, but doing so would be trivial if added to existing methods for field path tracking.
